description: Automatically push to GitHub after each story commit completes

userStories.description: Add new event variants for push status to both the TypeScript and Rust event systems. In packages/baro-app/src/core/events.ts, add a new BaroEvent variant: { type: 'push_status'; id: string; success: boolean; error?: string }. In crates/baro-tui/src/events.rs, add a matching PushStatus variant to the BaroEvent enum with fields id (String), success (bool), and error (Option<String>). This event will be emitted after each story's commit is pushed to the remote.
userStories.title: Add push event types to the event system

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/executor.rs, add an async function auto_push(cwd: &Path) -> Result<(), String> that: 1) checks a remote exists via 'git remote get-url origin', 2) gets the current branch via 'git branch --show-current', 3) runs 'git push origin <branch>'. Call this function in execute_story() right after the successful update_prd_story() and get_git_file_stats() calls (around line 330). After pushing, send a BaroEvent::PushStatus event via the tx channel with the story id and success/error. Also add auto-push in the Node.js executor (packages/baro-app/src/core/executor.ts): after the story_complete emit (around line 103), call the existing autoPush function from git.ts and emit a push_status event.
userStories.title: Wire auto-push into the Rust executor after each story commit

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/app.rs: 1) Add a push_results field to App struct: pub push_results: Vec<(String, bool, Option<String>)> storing (story_id, success, error). Initialize it as empty Vec in App::new(). 2) In handle_event(), add a match arm for BaroEvent::PushStatus that pushes the result to push_results and logs success/failure to the story's active logs if still active. In crates/baro-tui/src/screens/execute.rs: in the story list item rendering, if a story is Complete AND has a successful push in push_results, append a small '↑' upload indicator after the checkmark. If push failed, show '↑!' in red. This gives visual feedback that code was pushed.
userStories.title: Handle push events in TUI app state and display push status

userStories.description: In the Rust executor (crates/baro-tui/src/executor.rs), after the main execution loop completes (before emitting the Done event, around line 575), do a final 'git add prd.json && git commit -m "chore: update prd.json completion status" && git push origin <branch>' to ensure the final prd.json state is pushed. In the Node.js executor (packages/baro-app/src/core/executor.ts), do the same before the final done emit. In the TUI completion screen (crates/baro-tui/src/screens/execute.rs render_completion()), add a line showing push status: 'Pushed: N/M stories' showing how many were successfully pushed out of total completed, using the push_results from app state.
userStories.title: Add final push of prd.json on completion and show push summary in completion screen
